title: Batch ML monitoring & data quality
summary: Reference-backed validation and drift checks on incoming tabular batches, with structured alerts and reproducible JSON/HTML artifacts.
metaDescription: Batch ML monitoring demo: schema validation, PSI/KS drift, prediction monitoring, alerts, CSV/HTML reports, optional Streamlit viewer.
heroTitle: Batch ML monitoring & data quality pipeline
heroNote: Runs offline from CSV batches and emits artifacts under artifacts/. An optional Streamlit app reads those files for exploration — there is no inference API in this repository.
limitations: Single-machine batch demo — not streaming or multi-tenant observability.
Uses packaged CSV scenarios and committed artifacts for reproducibility.
No live scoring API; monitoring runs after batches land.

recruiter.pageTitle: ML monitoring & data quality — applied ML engineering
recruiter.summary: I validate incoming tabular batches against a JSON schema, compare them to a frozen reference window (numeric PSI/KS, categorical drift), monitor prediction behaviour, and emit machine-readable reports plus a static HTML roll-up. CI exercises the same logic with pytest.
recruiter.heroNote: Artifacts are produced by `run_full_monitoring`; the hosted Streamlit viewer is read-only over those files — not a production observability stack.
recruiter.footerProjectSub: Batch validation · drift · prediction checks · tested pipeline
limitations: Demonstrates engineering judgement on monitoring layers — not an enterprise APM or feature store.
Offline batch flow only; no online inference or auto-remediation.
Synthetic reference/current splits committed for reproducible review.

commercial.pageTitle: ML monitoring & data quality — VahdetLabs capability overview
commercial.summary: Silent schema drift and shifting score distributions erode model trust before KPIs move. This reference pipeline shows how batch validation, drift signals, and structured alerts surface degradation early — scoped for pilots and integration workshops, not as a hosted SaaS.
commercial.heroNote: Static overview page. Pilot engagements adapt connectors, schemas, and thresholds to your batch feeds — without implying full-stack observability.
commercial.footerProjectSub: Pilot-friendly monitoring slice · validation · drift · reporting
limitations: Not a multi-tenant SaaS product — a bounded monitoring slice for scoped delivery.
Assumes batch drops you control; streaming or real-time scoring needs separate design.
Thresholds and schemas are agreement artefacts — tuned per engagement.
